basic_details.job_title: NeGD Tech Lead Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: National e-Governance Division (NeGD) Tech Lead Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of NeGD. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the NeGD Tech Lead Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor’s degree in engineering, Computer Science, IT, or equivalent
qualification.details: Bachelor’s degree in engineering, Computer Science, IT, or equivalent.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NeGD Tech Lead Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 31-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NeGD to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NeGD Tech Lead Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the NeGD Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download NeGD Tech Lead Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.text: Bachelor’s degree in engineering, Computer Science, IT, or equivalent.

NeGD Tech Lead Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NeGD Tech Lead Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 31-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NeGD to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NeGD Tech Lead Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NeGD Tech Lead recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the NeGD Tech Lead position is 31st July 2026. It is advisable to apply well in advance of the deadline to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum qualification required for the Tech Lead post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Bachelor’s degree in engineering, Computer Science, IT, or an equivalent qualification to be eligible for the Tech Lead position at NeGD.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Tech Lead position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Tech Lead post is 55 years. There is no minimum age limit specified in the provided data.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for the NeGD Tech Lead recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the NeGD Tech Lead recruitment. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for the Tech Lead role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Tech Lead position at NeGD involves two main stages: initial screening of applications followed by an interview for shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q6. What type of job is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for a contractual position. The job type is specified as 'Contract' in the official notification details.

faq.question: Q7. Where is the location of the job?
faq.answer: The job is located in New Delhi, Delhi, with a pincode of 110003. This indicates the primary work location for the selected candidate.

faq.question: Q8. How many vacancies are available for the Tech Lead post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Tech Lead post in this recruitment drive by the National e-Governance Division (NeGD).

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this NeGD Tech Lead recruitment is N-21/172/2024-NeGD. This number should be used for reference in all application-related correspondence.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates from all over India apply?
faq.answer: The job is based in New Delhi, and the application mode is online. While specific state restrictions are not mentioned, candidates from anywhere can apply online if they meet the eligibility criteria.
